content.problemStatement:
For a permutation PPP of the integers 111 to NNN, we define a new array APA_PAP​ of length N−2N-2N−2 as follows:


For 1≤i≤N−21 \leq i \leq N-21≤i≤N−2, (AP)i(A_P)_i(AP​)i​ denotes the number of inversions in the subarray P[i:i+2]P[i : i+2]P[i:i+2], i.e, the number of inversions in the array [Pi,Pi+1,Pi+2][P_i, P_{i+1}, P_{i+2}][Pi​,Pi+1​,Pi+2​].
You are given an array AAA of length NNN, all of whose elements lie between 000 and 333. Does there exist a permutation PPP of length N+2N+2N+2 such that AP=AA_P = AAP​=A?


Input Format

The first line of input will contain one integer TTT, the number of test cases. The description of TTT test cases follows.
Each test case consists of two lines of input.
The first line of each test case contains a single integer NNN, the size of AAA.
The second line of each test case contains NNN space-separated integers — the values of A1,A2,…,ANA_1, A_2, \ldots, A_NA1​,A2​,…,AN​.


Output Format
For each test case, output in a single line the answer — YES\texttt{YES}YES if a permutation that satisfies the given conditions exists, and NO\texttt{NO}NO otherwise.


The output is not case sensitive, so for example the strings YES, Yes, yES\texttt{YES, Yes, yES}YES, Yes, yES, etc. will all be treated as correct.
constraints: The sum of NNN over all test cases doesn't exceed 10510^5105

sampleTestCases.explanation:
Explanation:
Test case 111: Consider P=[1,2,6,5,3,4]P = [1, 2, 6, 5, 3, 4]P=[1,2,6,5,3,4]. It can be verified that AP=[0,1,3,2]A_P = [0, 1, 3, 2]AP​=[0,1,3,2]. There are other permutations which give the same array — for example [2,3,6,5,1,4][2, 3, 6, 5, 1, 4][2,3,6,5,1,4] and [3,4,6,5,1,2][3, 4, 6, 5, 1, 2][3,4,6,5,1,2].
Test case 222: It can be verified that no permutation PPP of length 666 has AP=[0,1,2,3]A_P = [0, 1, 2, 3]AP​=[0,1,2,3].
Test case 333: The only permutation that satisfies the condition is P=[1,2,3,4,5,6]P = [1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6]P=[1,2,3,4,5,6].
Test case 444: It can be verified that no permutation PPP of length 777 has AP=[0,1,2,1,0]A_P = [0, 1, 2, 1, 0]AP​=[0,1,2,1,0]
